title: Minecraft-The CATASTROPHE mod
description: Adds  new bosses to the base game, and overhauls the progression
body:
Catastrophe mod is a counterpart of the terraria calamity mod for minecraft, reworking the game's mechanics. There are over 22 planned bosses, each with unique loot, music etc. The Ender dragon and Wither are also to be reworked to be part of this roster
V5 is a planned rework of older bosses and the wither
As of May 2026, V5- WITHERING WITH THE NIGHT- will be released in late may

The newest REVEAL trailer <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JjkQtL83rQk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
